title: huperzia attenuata
intro: Huperzia attenuata, also known as Qianggu, is a type of evergreen shrub or small tree belonging to the club moss family (Lycopodiaceae). This plant is traditionally used in Chinese medicine and has been found to possess antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, making it valuable for its medicinal and health benefits. The extracts of Huperzia attenuata have been shown to have neuroprotective effects and may help in the treatment of neurodegenerative diseases such as Alzheimer's and Parkinson's. Huperzia attenuata is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, capsules, and extracts, which are available in the market for various health benefits, including improving cognitive function and memory.
